name: @slicenfer/project-memory-runtime-monorepo
description: Local-first lifecycle memory runtime for coding agents

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-runtime-core build && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-code build && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-agent-sdk build && pnpm --filter project-memory-runtime build
scripts.test: pnpm run preflight:test && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-runtime-core test && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-code test && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-agent-sdk test && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memoryctl test && pnpm --filter project-memory-runtime test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-runtime-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-code typecheck && pnpm --filter @slicenfer/project-memory-adapter-claude-agent-sdk typecheck && pnpm --filter project-memory-runtime typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm exec eslint packages/runtime/src packages/runtime/tests packages/adapters/claude-code/src packages/adapters/claude-code/tests packages/adapters/claude-agent-sdk/src packages/adapters/claude-agent-sdk/tests packages/cli/src tools/benchmarks tools/memoryctl --max-warnings=0
